query:
SELECT "amount!", "created!"
FROM (
    SELECT
        member,
        amount as "amount!",
        created as "created!"
    FROM gear_bank_deposits

    UNION ALL

    SELECT
        target AS member,
        amount AS "amount!",
        created as "created!"
    FROM gear_bank_transfers

    UNION ALL

    SELECT
        source AS member,
        -amount AS "amount!",
        created as "created!"
    FROM gear_bank_transfers

    UNION ALL

    SELECT
        member,
        (-personal * quantity) AS "amount!",
        created as "created!"
    FROM gear_bank_purchases
) ledger
WHERE member = $1
ORDER BY "created!" DESC;
